home_tagline: Your All-in-One Child Growth Monitoring Assistant
home_no_activity: No recent activity. Perform an analysis to see it here.
home_dashboard_description: Overview and quick access to all tools.
bp_analyzer_description: Age, sex, and height-adjusted BP percentiles.
gcv_description_short: Unified SD curve viewer for all indicators.
hfa_description_short: WHO LMS Z-score calculation and classification.
bp_description: Calculates age, sex, and height-adjusted BP percentiles for children aged 1-17.
enter_data_for_chart: Enter data to see the chart.
gcv_description: Unified SD curve viewer for all WHO growth indicators.
hfa_description: Calculates WHO Z-scores and percentiles for child's height based on age and sex (0-228 months).
wfa_description: Calculates WHO Z-scores and percentiles for a child's weight based on age and sex (0-120 months).
wfl_description: Assesses wasting and overweight in infants and children up to 2 years (or 110cm in length).
wfh_description: Assesses body proportion for children over 2 years (or 65-120cm in height).
bfa_description: Calculates Body Mass Index (BMI) and classifies weight status for children aged 0-228 months.
hcfa_description: Neurodevelopment monitoring via SD curves (0-60 months).
acfa_description: Malnutrition screening with program thresholds (3-60 months).
tsfa_description: Body fat estimation using percentiles (3-60 months).
history_description: Review and manage all past calculations and analyses.
history_delete_selected_warning: This action will permanently delete {count} selected activities. This cannot be undone.
history_clear_all_warning: This action cannot be undone. This will permanently delete all your activity history.
history_no_activities_subtext: Perform an analysis on any tool page to save it to your history.
